context.projectOverview: agent-bober medical-sop pipeline. Sprint 2 composes the Sprint-1 grounding critic with synthesize into a fail-closed gate (synthesize -> critic -> one re-synth -> abstain) and wires it into the engine's grounded-synthesis branch, preserving every zero-LLM negative assertion on non-grounded paths.

completedSprints.title: Grounding-critic module (fail-closed core)
completedSprints.summary: src/medical/retrieval/grounding-critic.ts exports getGroundingVerdict (bounded retry, fail-closed reject on parse exhaustion), validateGroundingVerdict (never-throws), buildGroundingSystemPrompt, GROUNDING_PARSE_MAX_RETRIES, GROUNDING_MAX_LLM_CALLS. getGroundingVerdict does NOT catch transport errors (they propagate). Commit 10bb964.
